title: Welcome to the NK Udada Foundation blog
excerpt: A new weekly space to share updates from the field, program recaps, and stories from the young people we work with.
author: NK Udada Foundation
body:
We're starting a weekly blog to keep our community closer to the work.

Each week, we'll share short updates from our programmes — school outreach visits, menstrual health distributions, community health camps, and volunteer spotlights. Expect real numbers, real photos, and honest reflections on what's working and what we're still figuring out.

If there's something you'd like us to cover, reach out through our contact page. Thanks for reading.
